title: Transformers: Armada
synopsis: When the Mini-Cons, a race of small Transformers with the power to enhance larger robots, are scattered across Earth, Autobots and Decepticons race to claim them. As the conflict escalates, both sides discover that the ancient planet-eater Unicron engineered the Mini-Cons to feed on the hatred generated by the war, forcing lifelong enemies to unite against a threat that could consume the entire universe.

episodes.title: First Encounter
episodes.synopsis: Three kids — Rad, Carlos, and Alexis — discover a buried Mini-Con panel in a cave, inadvertently sending a signal that draws both Autobots and Decepticons to Earth.

episodes.title: Metamorphosis
episodes.synopsis: The Autobots arrive on Earth and adopt vehicle forms while the kids learn about the ancient war. Megatron and the Decepticons attack, and the first battle for Mini-Cons begins.

episodes.title: Base
episodes.synopsis: The Autobots establish their Earth headquarters and begin scanning for dormant Mini-Con panels. The Decepticons launch their own search, setting the stage for a prolonged race.

episodes.title: Comrade
episodes.synopsis: Hot Shot bonds with the Mini-Con Jolt as both factions compete for a newly activated panel. His recklessness nearly costs the team the mission.

episodes.title: Soldier
episodes.synopsis: The Decepticons capture a Mini-Con and force it to power up Megatron. The Autobots must stage a daring rescue to prevent the balance of power from shifting.

episodes.title: Jungle
episodes.synopsis: A Mini-Con panel activates in a dense jungle, forcing both factions into treacherous terrain. The kids prove their worth by helping the Autobots navigate the hostile environment.

episodes.title: Carnival
episodes.synopsis: A Mini-Con signal is detected at a carnival, forcing the Autobots to operate covertly among crowds of humans. The Decepticons attack without such restraint.

episodes.title: Palace
episodes.synopsis: The hunt for a Mini-Con leads to ancient ruins, where Starscream's ambitions begin to surface. His rivalry with Megatron intensifies as he seeks power for himself.

episodes.title: Confrontation
episodes.synopsis: Optimus Prime and Megatron clash in a one-on-one showdown while their teams scramble for a newly discovered Mini-Con. The stakes of the conflict become painfully clear.

episodes.title: Underground
episodes.synopsis: A Mini-Con panel is located deep underground, leading both factions into a network of caves. The Autobots and kids must navigate cave-ins and Decepticon ambushes.

episodes.title: Ruin
episodes.synopsis: An ancient structure holds a Mini-Con panel, but the site begins to collapse during the battle. The Autobots must choose between claiming the prize and saving lives.

episodes.title: Prehistory
episodes.synopsis: A Mini-Con panel in a prehistoric-themed area leads to the discovery of clues about the Mini-Cons' ancient history and how they originally arrived on Earth.

episodes.title: Swoop
episodes.synopsis: The Autobots race to retrieve a Mini-Con panel on a remote mountain peak. Cyclonus leads an aerial assault, and the Autobots struggle without adequate air support.

episodes.title: Overmatch
episodes.synopsis: The Decepticons gain the upper hand by powerlinxing with multiple Mini-Cons at once. The Autobots are outgunned and must find a new strategy to survive.

episodes.title: Gale
episodes.synopsis: A Mini-Con panel activates during a massive storm, making retrieval extremely dangerous. Both sides brave the elements in a tense race against nature and each other.

episodes.title: Credulous
episodes.synopsis: Sideways appears and offers his services to the Autobots, but his true loyalties remain suspect. His presence sows distrust within the team.

episodes.title: Conspiracy
episodes.synopsis: Sideways plays both factions against each other while secretly furthering his own agenda. The Autobots begin to suspect treachery from within.

episodes.title: Trust
episodes.synopsis: Starscream defects from the Decepticons and seeks refuge with the Autobots. Hot Shot is tasked with keeping an eye on him, and an uneasy bond begins to form.

episodes.title: Vacation
episodes.synopsis: The kids take a break from the war, but a Mini-Con signal disrupts their downtime. Even a moment of peace is impossible while the conflict rages on.

episodes.title: Reinforcement
episodes.synopsis: Jetfire arrives from Cybertron as Autobot reinforcement, bringing much-needed air power. His combination ability with Optimus Prime turns the tide of battle.

episodes.title: Decisive Battle
episodes.synopsis: An all-out battle erupts as both sides bring their full forces to bear over a critical Mini-Con cache. Jetfire and Optimus combine for the first time in combat.

episodes.title: Vow
episodes.synopsis: Starscream struggles with his allegiance to the Autobots and his Decepticon pride. Hot Shot tries to reach him, but Starscream's inner conflict deepens.

episodes.title: Rebellion
episodes.synopsis: Starscream openly defies Megatron and is punished severely. His rebellion sets the stage for a dramatic power struggle within the Decepticon ranks.

episodes.title: Chase
episodes.synopsis: A high-speed pursuit erupts when both factions detect a Mini-Con panel simultaneously. The race pushes the Transformers and their human allies to their limits.

episodes.title: Tactician
episodes.synopsis: Thrust arrives on Earth as Megatron's new strategic advisor, immediately proving himself a cunning tactician. His schemes put the Autobots on the defensive.

episodes.title: Linkup
episodes.synopsis: The three Mini-Con weapons — the Star Saber, Skyboom Shield, and Requiem Blaster — are assembled. Their combined power hints at something far greater and more dangerous.

episodes.title: Detection
episodes.synopsis: The Autobots detect a massive energy signature that dwarfs anything they have encountered before. Initial investigations reveal it is connected to the Mini-Con weapons.

episodes.title: Awakening
episodes.synopsis: Signs of Unicron's existence begin to surface as strange phenomena affect both Cybertron and Earth. The true purpose of the Mini-Cons starts to become clear.

episodes.title: Desperate
episodes.synopsis: With Unicron's threat looming, the Autobots launch a desperate operation to secure the remaining Mini-Con weapons before the Decepticons can claim them.

episodes.title: Runaway
episodes.synopsis: One of the kids runs away from the base after an argument, only to stumble into a Decepticon operation. The Autobots must rescue their human ally before it is too late.

episodes.title: Past
episodes.synopsis: Flashbacks reveal the ancient history of the Mini-Cons and how they were created on Cybertron. The origins of their power and their connection to a greater force are explored.

episodes.title: Past II
episodes.synopsis: The history lesson continues, revealing that the Mini-Cons' ship was deliberately sent to Earth to escape a catastrophic war. Sideways' true nature begins to emerge.

episodes.title: Sacrifice
episodes.synopsis: Starscream makes the ultimate sacrifice to convince Megatron that Unicron is the true enemy. His death shocks both factions and becomes a turning point in the war.

episodes.title: Regeneration
episodes.synopsis: In the aftermath of Starscream's sacrifice, the Autobots and Decepticons begin tentative ceasefire negotiations. Megatron starts to reconsider the nature of the conflict.

episodes.title: Rescue
episodes.synopsis: A joint Autobot-Decepticon rescue mission is launched to save allies trapped by Unicron's forces. The uneasy alliance is tested under fire.

episodes.title: Mars
episodes.synopsis: The combined forces travel to Mars, where Unicron's influence has created a staging ground. The planet-eater's power becomes terrifyingly apparent.

episodes.title: Crack
episodes.synopsis: Cracks in the alliance form as old grudges resurface between Autobots and Decepticons. Thrust exploits the tension for his own mysterious purposes.

episodes.title: Threaten
episodes.synopsis: Unicron's heralds threaten Cybertron directly, forcing the Transformers to defend their homeworld. The scale of the threat becomes impossible to ignore.

episodes.title: Crisis
episodes.synopsis: Cybertron faces imminent destruction as Unicron draws near. Megatron undergoes a transformation into Galvatron, powered by Unicron's dark energy.

episodes.title: Remorse
episodes.synopsis: Galvatron struggles with the choices he has made and the lives lost in the war. The weight of Starscream's sacrifice haunts him as the final battle approaches.

episodes.title: Depart
episodes.synopsis: The combined Autobot-Decepticon fleet departs for the final confrontation with Unicron. The kids say their goodbyes as the Transformers head into uncertain battle.

episodes.title: Miracle
episodes.synopsis: Against impossible odds, the combined forces score a critical hit against Unicron. The Mini-Cons demonstrate their true power when united by a common cause.

episodes.title: Puppet
episodes.synopsis: Thrust is revealed to be a puppet of Unicron, manipulating both factions from the beginning. His betrayal forces the alliance to reassess everything they thought they knew.

episodes.title: Uprising
episodes.synopsis: The Mini-Cons rise up against Unicron's control, fighting for their own freedom. Their rebellion provides a critical opening for the Transformers' assault.

episodes.title: Dash
episodes.synopsis: Hot Shot leads a daring high-speed assault on Unicron's outer defenses. Speed and precision are the only advantages against the planet-eater's overwhelming power.

episodes.title: Drift
episodes.synopsis: The alliance begins to drift apart under the pressure of Unicron's psychological attacks. Galvatron's loyalty wavers as Unicron offers him ultimate power.

episodes.title: Portent
episodes.synopsis: Dark omens signal that Unicron is about to fully awaken. The Transformers scramble to prepare for his transformation from planet to destroyer.

episodes.title: Cramp
episodes.synopsis: Space around Unicron warps and compresses, trapping the fleet. The Transformers must find a way to break free before they are crushed by gravitational forces.

episodes.title: Alliance
episodes.synopsis: Optimus Prime and Galvatron formally unite their forces for the final assault on Unicron. Old enemies stand side by side as the fate of the universe hangs in the balance.

episodes.title: Union
episodes.synopsis: The combined forces of Autobots, Decepticons, and Mini-Cons launch their final assault on Unicron. Every warrior gives everything they have in the battle for survival.

episodes.title: Origin
episodes.synopsis: The true origin of Unicron and his connection to the Mini-Cons is finally revealed. The key to defeating the planet-eater lies in understanding how he was created.

episodes.title: Mortal Combat
episodes.synopsis: In the epic series finale, Optimus Prime and Galvatron confront Unicron in a climactic battle. Galvatron sacrifices himself to end Unicron's threat, bringing the war to a bittersweet close.

facts: Armada was the first Transformers cartoon co-developed between the United States and Japan, with animation by Actas Inc. and English localization by Voicebox Productions.
The English dub premiered six months before the original Japanese version aired in its home country.
The rushed production schedule resulted in numerous dubbing errors, including characters being called by the wrong names — particularly the Mini-Cons.
Armada launched the 'Unicron Trilogy' continuity alongside its sequels Energon and Cybertron, which together formed a connected three-series saga.
Starscream's characterization in Armada is considered one of the most sympathetic portrayals of the character in any Transformers series, culminating in a self-sacrifice that shocked fans.
The episode 'Linkup' received significantly altered and corrected animation for the Japanese broadcast, highlighting the quality inconsistencies that plagued the original production.
